projects.projectValue: Not specified, but significant for 1 GW.

projects.projectName: NSW Investment Delivery Authority (IDA) Data Centre Projects (Portfolio)
projects.owner: Various (not specified, but 15 projects are progressing)
projects.summary: The NSW State Government announced on March 27, 2026, that fifteen data centre projects, collectively valued at A$51.9 billion, will be fast-tracked through the Investment Delivery Authority (IDA) for planning approvals. These projects represent a significant expansion of digital infrastructure in the state.
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Design review, QAQC, inspection, FAT during detailed design and construction of data centre infrastructure and associated grid connections.
mpServices: and critical power infrastructure for data centres.
projects.statusNote: These projects are in the planning approval phase and are not yet under construction, fitting the criteria for new data centre opportunities.

projects.location: Central-West Orana Region, New South Wales
projects.epcContractor: ACEREZ (consortium of ACCIONA, COBRA, and Endeavour Energy)
projects.summary: This is Australia's first competitively sourced REZ transmission project, involving 90 km of 500-kV and 150 km of 330-kV overhead transmission lines, energy hubs, and supporting infrastructure. Construction commenced in June 2025, with energisation expected in 2028.
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Ongoing QAQC, inspection, and FAT for HV components during construction and commissioning phases. Asset management services post-completion.
projects.statusNote: While construction has started, the scale and duration of the project mean ongoing opportunities for specialized services.

projects.projectName: Brazil BESS Auction Projects (LRCAP 2026 – Armazenamento Nacional & Armazenamento)
projects.location: Various locations across Brazil (connected to the SIN)
projects.procurementStatus: Pre-tender (auctions scheduled for December 2, 2026, and December 4, 2026)
projects.owner: To be determined (project developers winning the auction)
projects.summary: Brazil is launching its first dedicated auctions for new battery energy storage systems (BESS) in December 2026. Project registration is open from June 15 to July 31, 2026. These auctions aim to contract power from BESS projects with a minimum capacity of 30 MW and four hours of continuous operation.
financiers: To be determined (potential for BNDES financing for nationalized projects)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Design review, QAQC, inspection, FAT during project development, EPC selection, and construction phases (late 2026 onwards).
projects.projectValue: Not specified, but significant given the market potential (R$ 22 billion in direct investments by 2030 for BESS).
projects.statusNote: This represents a significant new market for BESS in Brazil, with projects currently in the pre-tender phase.

projects.projectName: Brazil Transmission Auction Projects (Leilão nº 1/2026 – 2ª etapa & Leilão nº 4/2026)
projects.location: Various states across Brazil (e.g., Pará, Mato Grosso, Ceará, Rio Grande do Norte, Sergipe, Bahia, Minas Gerais, Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo, Paraná)
projects.procurementStatus: Tender Active (Leilão nº 1/2026 – 2ª etapa); Pre-tender (Leilão nº 4/2026)
projects.owner: To be determined (companies winning the auctions)
projects.summary: Brazil is actively expanding its electricity transmission infrastructure through a series of auctions. The second stage of Transmission Auction nº 1/2026 is scheduled for July 3, 2026, and Transmission Auction nº 4/2026 is set for October 30, 2026. The first stage of Leilão nº 1/2026 in March 2026 contracted R$ 3.3 billion in investments for new transmission lines and substations across 11 states.
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Design review, QAQC, inspection, FAT during EPC selection and construction phases (late 2026 onwards).
projects.projectValue: R$ 3.3 billion contracted in the first stage of Leilão nº 1/2026.
projects.statusNote: These ongoing and upcoming auctions present immediate opportunities for new HV transmission projects.

projects.projectName: Casa dos Ventos New Solar Project (Fótons de São Cláudio Energias)
projects.location: Brazil (specific location not detailed in recent articles, but partnership with Ypê for self-production)
projects.procurementStatus: Awarded / Under Construction (part of R$12 billion investment by early 2026)
projects.owner: Casa dos Ventos (in partnership with Ypê for self-production)
projects.summary: Casa dos Ventos is developing a new 1 GW solar project, named Fótons de São Cláudio Energias, as part of a R$12 billion investment in renewable energy. A partnership with Ypê for self-production from this park was approved by Cade in December 2024.
financiers: capital markets (part of R$12 billion investment)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: QAQC, inspection, FAT during construction and commissioning phases.
projects.projectValue: Part of a R$12 billion investment by Casa dos Ventos for 4.2 GW of renewables by early 2026.
projects.statusNote: This project is likely in the construction or advanced development phase, given the 2026 target for the overall investment.
